title: More Nonsense Limerick 76
content:
There was an old person of Ealing,
    Who was wholly devoid of good feeling;
    He drove a small gig, 
    With three Owls and a Pig,
    Which distressed all the people of Ealing.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 76"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
